My First F-Droid Archive Demo

These are the apps that have been archived from the main repo.

Currently it serves 0 apps. To add it to your F-Droid app, scan the QR code (click it to enlarge) or use this link:

https://onkelennovending.github.io/fdroid-repo/archive

If you would like to manually verify the fingerprint (SHA-256) of the repository signing key, here it is:
E3 CB 74 7A 9C DA 33 64 BD 8D D2 0A 8B 75 66 A0 16 B5 6E BF 95 64 87 14 34 F3 66 00 73 B0 FB DF
